cards.name: Signet
cards.fee_waiver: Spend Rs.75,000/- in current year and get a waiver on next year's annual membership fee. (Joining fee waiver: Spend more than Rs. 10,000/- within first 3 Months and get the joining fee of Rs. 750/- waived off for the first year.) Above condition is not applicable for customers onboarded with effect from 03rd April 2023, since no fee is charged.
cards.source_section: SCHEDULE OF CHARGES/TAXES table, Joining Fee / Annual Membership fee rows, Signet column

cards.name: Imperio
cards.fee_waiver: Spend Rs. 1,50,000/- in current year and get a waiver on next year's annual membership fee. (Joining fee waiver: Spend more than Rs. 20,000/- within first 3 Months and get the joining fee of Rs. 1500/- waived off for the first year.) Above condition is not applicable for customers onboarded with effect from 03rd April 2023, since no fee is charged.
cards.source_section: SCHEDULE OF CHARGES/TAXES table, Joining Fee / Annual Membership fee rows, Imperio column

cards.name: Celesta
cards.fee_waiver: Spend Rs. 3,00,000/- in current year and get a waiver on next year's annual membership fee. (Joining fee waiver: Spend more than Rs. 30,000/- within first 3 Months and get the joining fee of Rs. 3000/- waived off for the first year.) Above condition is not applicable for customers onboarded with effect from 03rd April 2023, since no fee is charged.
cards.source_section: SCHEDULE OF CHARGES/TAXES table, Joining Fee / Annual Membership fee rows, Celesta column

cards.name: Wave Card
cards.source_section: SCHEDULE OF CHARGES/TAXES table, Joining Fee 'NIL (for virtual cards) Rs 199/- (if opted for physical card)' / Annual Membership fee '199/-', Wave Card column

cards.name: Scapia
cards.source_section: Federal x Scapia co-brand MITC (mitc-scapia-federal-credit-card): Joining Nil / Annual Nil; Foreign Currency Mark-up 0% (Nil); interest 45% p.a. (3.75%/mo). type=cobrand. Source-specific MITC differs from the file-level Federal MITC landing URL; see sources.json id 'federal-scapia'.

cards.name: OneCard
cards.source_section: Federal x OneCard co-brand MITC (OneCard MITC.pdf): issued by Federal Bank in partnership with FPL Technologies (NOT the CSB variant); annual/joining Nil (getonecard.app); forex 1% (getonecard.app blog). Finance inherits Federal issuer default (3.75%/mo, 45% p.a.) - OneCard's own rate is app/profile-determined and not published -> needs_review. type=cobrand. See sources.json id 'federal-onecard'.

bank_defaults.cash_advance: 2.5% of amount withdrawn or Rs. 500 whichever is higher (Not applicable for Wave Credit Card)
bank_defaults.cash_interest: All cash advances carry finance charges equal to the charges on revolving credit (Interest on Revolving Credit / APR, ranging from 23.88% i.e. 1.99% per month to 45.00% i.e. 3.75% per month based on Average Monthly Balance for last Quarter) from the date of withdrawal until paid. For cash advances, interest is charged from the date of the transaction until the date of payment; there is no interest free period for cash advances.
bank_defaults.source_section: SCHEDULE OF CHARGES/TAXES table (Foreign Currency Markup Fee, Cash Advance Fee, Interest free period rows) + 'Other Charges (Common on all Cards)' Interest on Revolving Credit (APR) table and Late Payment Charges table
